query: What is Elon Musk's current net worth according to Bloomberg Billionaires Index in early July 2026? Has it recovered above $1 trillion after the late June 2026 tech selloff? Include recent Tesla and SpaceX share price and valuation trajectory.
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings:

**Direct answer:** As of **July 10, 2026**, Elon Musk's net worth is **$913 billion per the Bloomberg Billionaires Index** ($917B per Forbes). **He has NOT recovered above $1 trillion** following the late-June 2026 tech selloff — his fortune has "frequently dropped to under $1 trillion since late June."

**Trajectory:**
- Became the **first-ever trillionaire on June 12, 2026** (SpaceX IPO), peaking at **~$1.32–1.4T intraday** around June 16.
- Fell **~$240B to ~$1.08T** (Bloomberg) by June 23 in the selloff, then continued declining below $1T into July.

**SpaceX (SPCX)** is the primary drag — at a **post-IPO low of $145.30** (July 10), down ~35.6% from its June 16 peak of $211.39, market cap ~$1.91T (vs. $2.78T peak).

**Tesla (TSLA)** has partially recovered — **$407.76** (July 10), up ~9% from its June 25 low of $375.12, but still ~18% below its 52-week high and down >7% YTD.

One caveat noted in the report: a live-tracker source cited ~$1.04T for July 10, but this conflicts with the authoritative Bloomberg/Wikipedia figure of $913B, which I weighted as definitive.

sources.title: Wealth of Elon Musk
sources.snippet: Elon Musk is the wealthiest person in the world, with an estimated net worth of US$913 billion according to the Bloomberg Billionaires Index and $917 billion according to Forbes, as of July 10, 2026... Since then, his net worth has fluctuated, reaching an intraday peak of $1.4 trillion the week after the IPO but frequently dropping to under $1 trillion since late June.

sources.title: SpaceX's drop off sees Elon Musk's net worth fall $240 billion
sources.snippet: Musk reached a historic $1.32 trillion following SpaceX's IPO; by late June his net worth dropped to $1.08 trillion (Bloomberg), a ~$240 billion decline. SpaceX market cap fell from a peak of $2.78 trillion to $2.03 trillion.

sources.title: Space Exploration Technologies Corp. (SPCX) Stock Price
sources.snippet: SPCX current price $145.30 (July 10, 2026), market cap ~$1.91T, 52-week high $225.64, down ~35.6% from high; June 16 peak close $211.39.

sources.title: Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) Stock Price
sources.snippet: TSLA current price $407.76 (July 10, 2026), market cap ~$1.53T, 52-week high $498.83, 52-week low $297.82; selloff low $375.12 on June 25.

sources.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX begins trading on the Nasdaq
sources.snippet: With SpaceX opening on the Nasdaq at $150 a share Friday, the CEO of SpaceX and Tesla became the world's first trillionaire on June 12, 2026.

sources.title: SpaceX IPO: Market cap tops $2 trillion after shares gain 19%
sources.snippet: SpaceX shares jumped more than 19% to $160.95 a share on debut, putting market value at roughly $2.1 trillion.

sources.title: SpaceX reveals its share price and record valuation
sources.snippet: SpaceX to sell 555.6 million Class A shares at a fixed price of $135 each, pricing SpaceX at roughly $1.77 trillion — the largest IPO in history.

sources.title: SpaceX shares drop below debut price before jumping amid $600bn sell-off
sources.snippet: SpaceX shares dipped below debut price, erasing $600bn in value before recovering 2.4 percent amid tech market turbulence.

sources.title: The Top 10 Richest People In The World | July 2026
sources.snippet: Only two of the world's ten wealthiest people got richer over the past month amid a broad sell-off of tech stocks. One of them is the world's first trillionaire.
